title: lepidium trifurcum
intro: Lepidium trifurcum, also known as Chinese pepperwort or Yangtze pepperwort, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its distinctive trifurcate leaves. Traditionally, Lepidium trifurcum has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Lepidium trifurcum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and support digestive health, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant and diuretic. Lepidium trifurcum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or capsule, and its extracts are also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
